Food & Drink · iPhone · iOS 17+

Airfryer Companion

Every dish, perfectly crisp.

Recipes, oven-to-airfryer conversion, cheat sheets and smart timers — everything you need to get the most out of your air fryer.

Coming soon to the App Store Key features

Free · Pro one-time purchase

About

What is Airfryer Companion?

Airfryer Companion turns your air fryer into the most-used appliance in your kitchen. Convert any oven recipe to the right air fryer time and temperature in seconds, or cook straight from a growing collection of air-fryer-first recipes.

Quick-reference cheat sheets cover the foods everyone actually makes — fries, chicken, vegetables, frozen snacks — with times and temperatures you can trust. Smart timers keep track of what is in the basket, and the My Cooks diary remembers what worked so you never have to guess twice.

The app is free to use, with a single affordable one-time Pro upgrade that unlocks everything — no subscription.

A closer look

Inside the app

Key features

Built around what matters

Oven → air fryer converter

Enter any oven time and temperature and get the air fryer equivalent instantly — no more guessing.

Air-fryer-first recipes

A curated recipe collection written for the air fryer, not adapted as an afterthought.

Cheat sheets

Instant times and temperatures for fries, chicken, vegetables, frozen snacks and more.

Smart timers

Run multiple timers with notifications, so nothing in the basket ever overcooks.

My Cooks diary

Save what you cooked with your own notes and settings, so your best results are always one tap away.

One-time Pro, no subscription

A single small purchase unlocks unlimited conversions, all recipes, all cheat sheets and My Cooks — forever.

Who it’s for

Made for people like you

  • New air fryer owners figuring out what their machine can really do
  • Busy households converting trusted oven recipes to faster air fryer versions
  • Meal preppers who want consistent, repeatable results
  • Anyone tired of scrolling blogs for a simple time and temperature

Airfryer Companion is almost here

Currently in final testing. Want to know the moment it launches? Drop us a line.

Notify me at launch

Privacy

How Airfryer Companion treats your data

No data collected. No ads, no analytics, no account — your cooks stay on your device.

Data collection

Airfryer Companion collects no personal data. Recipes, favorites, timers and your My Cooks diary live only on your device.

Advertising

Airfryer Companion contains no advertising.

Analytics

No analytics or tracking SDKs are included.

Accounts

No account or sign-up is required.

Storage

All data is stored locally on your iPhone. Deleting the app deletes your data.

Privacy questions

Email support@amsterdamfuturelabs.com — or read the full privacy policy for Airfryer Companion.

FAQ

Frequently asked questions

Is Airfryer Companion free?

The app is free to download and use. A one-time Pro purchase unlocks unlimited conversions, all recipes, all cheat sheets and the My Cooks diary — no subscription, ever.

Does the app work offline?

Yes. The converter, recipes, cheat sheets and timers all work without an internet connection.

Is my data stored or shared?

Everything stays on your device. There are no servers and no tracking.

Are there ads?

No. Airfryer Companion is completely ad-free.

Do I need an account?

No account is needed — everything works immediately.

Which devices are supported?

Airfryer Companion is designed for iPhone and requires iOS 17 or later. It is available in English and Dutch.

Does it work with my air fryer?

Yes — conversions and cheat sheets work for any basket or oven-style air fryer, regardless of brand.

How do I get support?

Email support@amsterdamfuturelabs.com — we aim to reply within two business days.

Support

Need a hand with Airfryer Companion?

Questions, bug reports, feature ideas — we read everything and aim to reply within two business days.
